questions.question: Who is the author of the book titled ‘The Little Book of Encouragement’?
questions.explanation: ‘The Little Book of Encouragement’ is a book authored by the Tibetan spiritual leader the Dalai Lama recently.The book includes quotes and words of wisdom to the people, to face the realities of the world posed by the pandemic. It also discusses how to combat extremism, polarity and climate change and his views on Tibet in his new book.

questions.question: Which Union Ministry has launched a unified portal for ‘Gobardhan’ scheme?
questions.explanation: The Union Jal Shakti Ministry has recently launched a unified portal on the ‘Gobardhan’ scheme. The portal aims to monitor the progress made under the scheme.The Gobardhan scheme was launched by the Government of India to manage cattle and biodegradable waste and also help enhance farmers’ income. It is being implemented under the Swachch Bharat Mission Grameen-Phase 2.

questions.question: Which technology entrepreneur has been appointed to the National Security Advisory Board (NSAB)?
questions.explanation: The founder of the Indian multinational Software company Zoho, Sridhar Vembu has been appointed to the National Security Advisory Board (NSAB). Padma ShriThe board is led by National Security Advisor (NSA) Ajit Doval. Other new members are former ISRO Chairman K Radhakrishnan, academic member Anshuman Tripathy and former ambassador Arun K Singh.

questions.question: India is set to celebrate the centenary birth year of which legendary vocalist?
questions.explanation: Pandit Bhimsen Joshi, the legendary vocalist, is being rerembered on his birth anniversary today. The year-long birth centenary celebrations of Pandit Bhimsen Joshi begin today. Hailed as the Tansen of India, Pandit Bhimsen Joshi, brought Hindustani classical music closer to the common man. He received the Bharat Ratna in 2008.

questions.question: What is the theme of the International Day of Human Fraternity 2021?
questions.explanation: The International Day of Human Fraternity is observed every year by the United Nations on February 4. This year the theme is :A Pathway to the FutureIn the year 2019, on the same day, the document entitled “Human fraternity for world peace and living together” was signed in 2019.

questions.question: ‘KAPILA’ programme, which was making news recently, is associated with which sector?
questions.explanation: In October 2020, the Union Education Minister Shri Ramesh Pokhriyal ‘Nishank’ virtually launched the ‘KAPILA’ Kalam Program for Intellectual Property Literacy and Awareness campaign.Under the programme students of higher educational institutions will get information about the system of application process for patenting their invention. It aims to create awareness about the Intellectual Property Rights.

questions.question: Which institution announced a scheme which enables retail participation in Government Securities market?
questions.explanation: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has announced that it will provide access to retail investors to participate in the Government Securities market.The retail investors shall have the facility to open a gilt securities account with the RBI. The RBI also announced to set up a 24×7 helpline for digital payment services. It directed all bank branches to participate in CTS clearing.

questions.question: As per the Union Ministry of Women and Child Development, how many children were missing in the year 2020?
questions.explanation: The Union Ministry of Women and Child Development created “Track Child portal”, to track the missing and found children.The Ministry provided the statistics recorded on this portal for the last 5 year. In the year 2020, from January 2020 to January 2021, 43515 children were found missing and 38113 children were found. All concerned authorities are asked to update the portal regularly.

questions.question: Which global digital payment company has announced to shut down its payment operations in India?
questions.explanation: American digital payments major, PayPal Inc. announced that it will shut down its payment operations in the country.PayPal, which was offering its payment gateway to Indian brands and online merchants, will shut down its domestic payment services in India, from April 1. It was also providing international remittance services for small and medium enterprises.

questions.question: Which Union Ministry is promoting the Floating Structure infrastructure in India?

options.label: C
options.text: Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways

answer.label: C
answer.text: Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways

questions.explanation: Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways is promoting the Floating Structure infrastructure in India. It has implemented projects including passenger floating jetties in Goa, water-aerodromes at Sabarmati River and seaplane services at Sardar Sarovar Dam.Recently, the Ministry issued guidelines for floating structures to suggest technical aspects for implementation of Minor Harbors, Waterdromes, Floating Jetties among others.
